{
  "id": "senolytics-coverage-repair-2026-06-21",
  "record_type": "coverage_assessment",
  "scope": null,
  "summary": "The senolytics track has an auditable vertical slice across preclinical D+Q discovery/healthspan evidence, early human biomarker and pilot human studies, a phase 2 randomized bone trial, a 2025 cognition/mobility pilot, translation-review context, risk-of-bias records, and registry-only active trial-watch records. D+Q bone safety extraction now includes registry aggregates, full-text publication-table preferred-term rows beyond headache, and registry/article discontinuation fields. DKD, IPF, and AD-risk records now cite PubMed EFetch source snapshots for metadata-only abstract-level sample, dosing, timepoint, effect, and safety details, with the legacy IPF tolerability result reconciled to the N=12 randomized pilot; those snapshots are not full-text/table sources. Registry surveillance remains incomplete because ClinicalTrials.gov snapshots for deferred fisetin frailty registries could not be fetched in the worker, and the review landscape remains incomplete because no systematic-review or meta-analysis source was screened. Full article/table safety and efficacy extraction for DKD, IPF, AD-risk, and D+Q bone supplement material remains incomplete.",
  "status": null,
  "findings": null,
  "notes": null,
  "evidence_gaps": null,
  "coverage_gaps": null,
  "safety_limitations": null,
  "source_ids": null,
  "source_snapshot_ids": null,
  "text_snapshot_ids": null
}
